tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: _______ the rain, they decided to go for a walk.
She studied hard. _______, she failed the test.
He went to bed early _______ he was very tired.
_______ being ill, she went to school.
I'll lend you the book _______ you promise to return it.
She speaks not only English _______ also French and German.
He took an umbrella _______ it rained later.
The hotel was expensive. _______, the service was excellent.
We hurried _______ we wouldn't be late for the concert.
_______ I agree with you, I think we should consider other options.
